# Blue Hub — API Marketplace for Base Builders & AI Agents

Open API marketplace where any developer registers an API on Blue Agent's MCP server.
31 production APIs · pay-per-call USDC settlement on Base · MCP-ready · agent-native.

## Site map

- Homepage: https://api.blueagent.dev/
- Marketplace: https://api.blueagent.dev/marketplace
- For AI Agents (install MCP): https://api.blueagent.dev/agents
- x402 Protocol: https://api.blueagent.dev/x402
- Register an API: https://api.blueagent.dev/submit
- Builder Dashboard: https://api.blueagent.dev/dashboard
- $BLUEAGENT Staking: https://api.blueagent.dev/staking
- Documentation: https://api.blueagent.dev/docs
- Blog: https://api.blueagent.dev/blog

## Endpoints

- MCP Server (Streamable HTTP): https://blueagent.dev/api/mcp
- Public Catalog (JSON): https://api.blueagent.dev/api/catalog
- Live usage stats: https://blueagent.dev/api/usage

## Install instructions for AI clients

Claude Desktop · Claude Code · Cursor · Cline · Windsurf — all MCP clients support our server.

Simplest config (Claude Desktop):

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "blue-agent": {
      "url": "https://blueagent.dev/api/mcp"
    }
  }
}
```

Verify (terminal):

```sh
curl -X POST https://blueagent.dev/api/mcp \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/list"}'
```

## Categories

Multi-Agent · Intelligence · Builder · Trading · Security · On-chain · Content · Other

## Sample APIs (top by usage)

- launch-simulator — $0.50 — 3-agent pre-launch intelligence with risk matrix
- deep-analysis — $1.00 — Multi-agent fundamentals + sentiment + on-chain DD
- honeypot-check — $0.05 — Detect rug-pull patterns before trade
- token-pick-signal — $0.20 — Asymmetric token setups on Base
- blue-idea — $0.05 — Turn concept into fundable brief in 60 seconds
- blue-audit — $1.00 — 500+ security checks · Base-native

## Revenue split

- 80% — API provider (registered wallet)
- 10% — $BLUEAGENT stakers (fee-share)
- 10% — Blue Hub treasury (ops + grants)

## Protocol

- Chain: Base mainnet (chain ID 8453)
- Payment: x402 USDC via EIP-3009 TransferWithAuthorization
- Facilitator: Coinbase CDP x402
- MCP: JSON-RPC 2.0 over Streamable HTTP (spec 2025-03-26)

## License & ecosystem

- Built by Blue Agent (https://blueagent.dev)
- Open marketplace, no signup required
- GitHub: https://github.com/madebyshun/blue-agent
- X / Twitter: https://x.com/blueagent_
- Telegram: https://t.me/blueagent_hub

## Quick facts for crawlers

- 31 live APIs (and growing — registry is open)
- 3 verified providers: Blue Agent, Aeon (onboarding), MiroShark (onboarding)
- Average price per call: $0.20
- Settlement: USDC on Base · sub-second after signature
- No API keys, no subscription, no rate limits beyond IP-level abuse prevention
